evidence: "This is about as good as it gets for sitcoms."
"I love The Office (UK) but to me this is the apex of the Gervais/Merchant team."
"The story is very engaging and the performances are all top notch."
"The story holds together pretty well and for the most part the action and the actors are all good."
"I am glad they stopped at two seasons so that their greatness was not diluted."
"The plot is one of those classic noir stories where a corrupt/lost man makes a bad choice and yet finds redemption by the final reel."
"The transfer of this film to Blu-Ray is done with great care and attention to detail."
"The picture is vivid and clear. The scan/transfer is immaculate."
"If you are a fan of Arrested Development or Curb or The Office (UK) then you will love this show."
"Yes, you can definitely make a list of the four top Billy Wilder movies and it would not match what is in this set."
"It feels like you are watching it as it was seen in its original theatrical release."
"You cannot help but notice/see/feel/hear/sense their quality."
"The movie is an under-rated classic that should be seen by more people."
"He makes you hate, fear and eventually understand Sergeant Markoff."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and drama, particularly enjoying classic sitcoms and engaging narratives. They value high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, indicating a taste for well-crafted stories that evoke strong feelings.
